bodyHtml:
研究对象: US GDP

财务数据

研究口径

项目 口径
研究对象 US GDP 指 Goodrich Petroleum Corporation，上市期间证券代码为 GDP，交易所为 NYSE American；本报告沿用 研究档案 的界定。[S1]
财务期间 因公司退市前最后可比完整年报为 2020 年 10-K，本报告三年趋势采用 2018、2019、2020 年年度数据。[S2][S3]
金额单位 除比率外，表内公司金额均为 USD million；原始 SEC 报表以 in thousands 披露，本报告换算为百万美元。[S2][S3][自测算]
毛利率定义 Goodrich 未披露通用 Gross profit 行，本报告使用油气经营毛利率：(Total revenues - Lease operating expense - Production and other taxes - Transportation and processing) / Total revenues。[S2][S3][自测算]
ROIC 定义 Operating income × (1 - 有效税率) / 平均投入资本；平均投入资本为平均 (Debt + Equity - Cash)，有效税率在亏损或税项为收益/零时按 0% 处理。[S2][S3][自测算]

1. 三年收入、净利润、毛利率、净利率趋势

年度 Total revenues Oil and natural gas revenues Lease operating expense Production and other taxes Transportation and processing Net income (loss) 油气经营毛利率 净利率
2018 $88.0 million [S2] $87.9 million [S2] 0.4 million [S2] $2.6 million [S2] 1.0 million [S2] .8 million [S2] 72.6% [自测算：($88.0m-0.4m-$2.6m-1.0m)/$88.0m；输入见本行[S2]] 2.0% [自测算：.8m/$88.0m；输入见本行[S2]]
2019 18.4 million [S3] 18.4 million [S3] 2.4 million [S3] $2.6 million [S3] $20.7 million [S3] 3.3 million [S3] 69.9% [自测算：(18.4m-2.4m-$2.6m-$20.7m)/18.4m；输入见本行[S3]] 11.2% [自测算：3.3m/18.4m；输入见本行[S3]]
2020 $93.8 million [S3] $93.8 million [S3] 3.0 million [S3] $2.8 million [S3] 9.1 million [S3] $44.1 million [S3] 62.9% [自测算：($93.8m-3.0m-$2.8m-9.1m)/$93.8m；输入见本行[S3]] 47.0% [自测算：-$44.1m/$93.8m；输入见本行[S3]]

2. ROE / ROA / ROIC 分析

年度 平均股东权益 平均总资产 平均投入资本 Operating income (loss) Net income (loss) ROE ROA ROIC
2018 $60.3 million [自测算：($56.3m 2017 equity[S2] + $64.4m 2018 equity[S2]) / 2] 70.0 million [自测算：(52.1m 2017 assets[S2] + 87.8m 2018 assets[S2]) / 2] 11.6 million [自测算：平均(Debt + Equity - Cash)，输入为 2017/2018 debt、equity、cash[S2]] 7.4 million [S2] .8 million [S2] 2.9% [自测算：.8m/$60.3m] 1.0% [自测算：.8m/70.0m] 15.6% [自测算：7.4m/11.6m]
2019 $74.3 million [自测算：($64.4m 2018 equity[S2] + $84.2m 2019 equity[S3]) / 2] $213.5 million [自测算：(87.8m 2018 assets[S2] + $239.3m 2019 assets[S3]) / 2] 62.2 million [自测算：平均(Debt + Equity - Cash)，输入为 2018/2019 debt、equity、cash[S2][S3]] 1.1 million [S3] 3.3 million [S3] 17.9% [自测算：3.3m/$74.3m] 6.2% [自测算：3.3m/$213.5m] 6.8% [自测算：1.1m/62.2m]
2020 $62.9 million [自测算：($84.2m 2019 equity[S3] + $41.6m 2020 equity[S3]) / 2] $222.2 million [自测算：($239.3m 2019 assets[S3] + $205.1m 2020 assets[S3]) / 2] 68.8 million [自测算：平均(Debt + Equity - Cash)，输入为 2019/2020 debt、equity、cash[S3]] $41.7 million [S3] $44.1 million [S3] 70.2% [自测算：-$44.1m/$62.9m] 19.9% [自测算：-$44.1m/$222.2m] 24.7% [自测算：-$41.7m/68.8m]
ROIC 注释 说明
2018 更正口径 2018 ROIC 为 15.6% [自测算：7.4m operating income[S2] / 11.6m 平均投入资本；平均投入资本为 2017 (debt $55.7m + equity $56.3m - cash $26.0m) 与 2018 (debt $76.8m + equity $64.4m - cash $4.1m) 的平均[S2]]
2019 更正口径 2019 ROIC 为 6.8% [自测算：1.1m operating income[S3] / 62.2m 平均投入资本；平均投入资本为 2018 (debt $76.8m + equity $64.4m - cash $4.1m) 与 2019 (debt 04.4m + equity $84.2m - cash .5m) 的平均[S2][S3]]
2020 解释 2020 ROIC 转负，主要因为 operating loss 为 -$41.7 million，且公司在 2020 年确认 oil and natural gas properties impairment 为 $36.1 million。[S3]

3. 杠杆与偿债指标

年度 Debt Total assets Total liabilities Stockholders' equity Current assets Current liabilities Debt / Equity Debt / Assets Liabilities / Assets Current ratio Interest coverage
2018 $76.8 million [S2] 87.8 million [S2] 23.3 million [S2] $64.4 million [S2] $21.2 million [S2] $42.3 million [S2] 1.19x [自测算：$76.8m/$64.4m] 40.9% [自测算：$76.8m/87.8m] 65.7% [自测算：23.3m/87.8m] 0.50x [自测算：$21.2m/$42.3m] 1.46x [自测算：7.4m operating income[S2] / 1.9m interest expense[S2]]
2019 04.4 million [S3] $239.3 million [S3] 55.2 million [S3] $84.2 million [S3] $23.2 million [S3] $43.0 million [S3] 1.24x [自测算：04.4m/$84.2m] 43.6% [自测算：04.4m/$239.3m] 64.8% [自测算：55.2m/$239.3m] 0.54x [自测算：$23.2m/$43.0m] 1.01x [自测算：1.1m operating income[S3] / 1.0m interest expense[S3]]
2020 10.2 million [S3] $205.1 million [S3] 63.5 million [S3] $41.6 million [S3] 4.0 million [S3] $42.0 million [S3] 2.65x [自测算：10.2m/$41.6m] 53.7% [自测算：10.2m/$205.1m] 79.7% [自测算：63.5m/$205.1m] 0.33x [自测算：4.0m/$42.0m] 5.91x [自测算：-$41.7m operating loss[S3] / $7.0m interest expense[S3]]

4. 现金流质量

年度 Net income (loss) Net cash provided by operating activities OCF / Net income OCF margin 现金流质量判断
2018 .8 million [S2] $49.2 million [S2] 28.11x [自测算：$49.2m/.8m] 55.9% [自测算：$49.2m/$88.0m total revenues[S2]] 会计利润很薄，但 OCF 明显高于净利润，主要受 DD&A 等非现金项目影响。[S2][自测算]
2019 3.3 million [S3] $79.1 million [S3] 5.95x [自测算：$79.1m/3.3m] 66.8% [自测算：$79.1m/18.4m total revenues[S3]] OCF 覆盖净利润，现金转化质量较强，但资本开支为 $99.3 million，超过 OCF。[S3][自测算]
2020 $44.1 million [S3] $58.9 million [S3] 1.33x [自测算：$58.9m / -$44.1m] 62.8% [自测算：$58.9m/$93.8m total revenues[S3]] 净亏损下 OCF 仍为正，OCF/净利润比率因分母为负不具备常规“倍数”解释；2020 年非现金 impairment 为 $36.1 million。[S3][自测算]

5. 关键财务指标 vs 行业平均

对比口径 US GDP / Goodrich 2020 行业平均：Oil/Gas (Production and Exploration), US 差异 解读
样本时间 2020 年 [S3] January 2026 数据口径，样本 142 家公司 [S4][S5][S6][S7] 不完全同期间 [自测算] Goodrich 2020 是退市前历史年度；行业均值是 Damodaran 当前公开行业数据，不应作为同年精确横向估值基准。[S3][S4]
Gross margin 62.9% [自测算；输入见第 1 节[S3]] 57.19% [S4] +5.7 pct [自测算：62.9%-57.19%] Goodrich 井口经营毛利率高于行业平均毛利率，但两者毛利定义可能不完全一致。[S4][自测算]
Net margin 47.0% [自测算；输入见第 1 节[S3]] 14.63% [S4] 61.6 pct [自测算：-47.0%-14.63%] 2020 净利率受 $36.1 million 油气资产减值和经营亏损拖累。[S3][自测算]
ROE 70.2% [自测算；输入见第 2 节[S3]] 12.21% [S5] 82.4 pct [自测算：-70.2%-12.21%] 权益基数从 2019 年 $84.2 million 降至 2020 年 $41.6 million，亏损放大了 ROE 下行。[S3][自测算]
ROIC 24.7% [自测算；输入见第 2 节[S3]] 13.92% unadjusted after-tax ROIC [S6] 38.6 pct [自测算：-24.7%-13.92%] Goodrich 2020 的投入资本回报率显著低于行业正值水平，主要源于 EBIT 为负。[S3][S6][自测算]
Debt / Equity 2.65x [自测算；输入见第 3 节[S3]] 36.69% market D/E unadjusted [S7] 不同定义 [自测算] Goodrich 用账面债务/账面权益；Damodaran 行业项为市场 D/E，方向上显示 Goodrich 2020 杠杆压力高。[S3][S7][自测算]
Interest coverage 5.91x [自测算；输入见第 3 节[S3]] 6.59x [S7] 12.50x [自测算：-5.91x-6.59x] Goodrich 2020 operating loss 使利息覆盖倍数为负，偿债弹性弱于行业均值。[S3][S7][自测算]
Net PP&E / Total assets 未单列同口径 [来源不明] 84.35% [S7] 不适用 [来源不明] Goodrich 10-K 披露油气资产和其他资产项目，但本报告未将其重分类为 Damodaran 的 Net PP&E 口径。[S3][S7]

资料来源 / Sources

[S1] U.S. SEC, Goodrich Petroleum Corporation Form 10-K for fiscal year ended December 31, 2020 — https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/943861/000143774921005932/gdpp20201231_10k.htm

[S2] U.S. SEC, Goodrich Petroleum Corporation Form 10-K for fiscal year ended December 31, 2019 — https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/943861/000143774920004441/gdpp20191217_10k.htm

[S3] U.S. SEC, Goodrich Petroleum Corporation Form 10-K for fiscal year ended December 31, 2020 — https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/943861/000143774921005932/gdpp20201231_10k.htm

[S4] NYU Stern / Aswath Damodaran, Margins by Sector (US) — https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/datafile/margin.html

[S5] NYU Stern / Aswath Damodaran, Return on Equity by Sector (US) — https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/datafile/roe.html

[S6] NYU Stern / Aswath Damodaran, Return on Capital by Sector (US) — https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/datafile/roc.html

[S7] NYU Stern / Aswath Damodaran, Debt Fundamentals by Sector (US) — https://pages.stern.nyu.edu/~adamodar/New_Home_Page/datafile/dbtfund.html
